name: ZS - Vanish Sage
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＺＳ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼアル・サーバス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻影賢者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バニッシュ・セージ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control a "Utopia" monster: You can draw 1 card. If a monster(s) you control is banished during the Battle Phase (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from the field, then target 1 of those banished monsters; Special Summon that target, and if you do, banish 1 monster your opponent controls that has 3000 or less ATK. You can only use 1 "ZS - Vanish Sage" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a "Utopia" monster: You can draw 1 card. If a monster(s) you control is banished during the Battle Phase (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from the field, then target 1 of those banished monsters; Special Summon that target, and if you do, banish 1 monster your opponent controls that has 3000 or less ATK. You can only use 1 "ZS - Vanish Sage" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: If you control a "Utopia" monster: You can draw 1 card. If a monster(s) you control is banished during the Battle Phase (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from the field, then target 1 of those banished monsters; Special Summon that target, and if you do, banish 1 monster your opponent controls that has 3000 or less ATK. You can only use 1 "ZS - Vanish Sage" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Activates if other cards are banished
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
